tou_notes: Manual review required - ToU not yet assessed. CRITICAL FINDING: twtex.com is a motorcycle forum community, NOT a curated Top 100 roads listing site. The PRD assumption about twtex.com having a 'Top 100 Motorcycle Roads' list appears incorrect. The site is primarily a forum at /forums/ with user-generated posts. Any road data would be scattered across forum threads, not available as a structured list.
technical_notes: CRITICAL: twtex.com does not have a Top 100 roads listing page. The site is a forum-based community (Two Wheeled Texans). No structured route data exists at /top-100 or similar paths. To extract road data from forum threads would require: 1) Identifying relevant threads (e.g., 'Best Roads in Texas'), 2) Forum scraping with pagination, 3) NLP to extract route names/locations from unstructured text. This is fundamentally different from the PRD assumption of scraping a curated list.
investigation_notes: Probe attempted to fetch /top-100, /top100, /roads, /routes, /motorcycle-roads, /best-roads - all returned 404. Homepage shows forum redirect to /forums/index.php. robots.txt only specifies 'Crawl-delay: 3', no Disallow rules. Site appears to be a standard XenForo or vBulletin forum platform.
prd_assumption_validation: FAIL - PRD assumes twtex.com has a 'Top 100 Motorcycle Roads' crowd-sourced list. Actual site is a motorcycle forum community. This invalidates the basic premise of UC-SRC-03.
